title: King Kong Gun — Closing Beat
description: Luffy’s last attack breaks Doflamingo and ends the tyrant’s rule over Dressrosa.
scene: On pages 14–18, Doflamingo, King Riku, Dressrosa Citizens, Luffy, Trafalgar Law move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: He tore through the threads!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You can barely stand...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I wonder how long you'll be able to keep that form up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Picking Midair as your Battleground with me as your opponent ...you've got massive balls, kid!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'll show you how it's really done... a true one hit Ko...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: FuffUfu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: FuffUFW!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I simply can't stand the sight of anyone standing over me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You've tried to keep every- thing within your grasp imprisoned away in your clutches...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Trying to control... manipulate... everyone and everything...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'm sick of it all! It makes me wanna puke!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Blame the blood that runs in your veins! Every last one of you were born beneath me...destined to be ruled over by another!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You peons and I are on completely different levels!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm gonna shut that mouth of yours and then get the hell outta here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Do it if you can, boy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: SPID-42'S WFB!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Gomu Gomu No...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: God thread!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: beasts that cannot be tamed... must be put down.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: 16 Sacred bullets of the Assas- Sin...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: In certain lands,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: There are those who call...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: The clan of "D" this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the middle of the house was that I was in the morning. I was

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: God's natural enemy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: "D" pieces the heavens!

summary: This part focuses on king kong gun, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
